basic_details.job_title: IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu)
basic_details.short_information: The Indian Institute of Technology Jammu (IIT Jammu) Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 notification has been released on the official website iitjammu.ac.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Jammu Recruitment 2026.

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.details: Junior Research Fellow: Maximum age limit is 28 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/Physically Challenged/Women candidates will receive a 5-year age relaxation.

qualification.details: Junior Research Fellow: M.Tech./M.E. in Chemical Engineering / Polymer Science and Engineering / Materials Engineering / Computational Chemistry or a related discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA from a recognized Institute/University and having qualified GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination conducted by Central Government Departments/Agencies. B.Tech. /B.E. in Chemical Engineering / Polymer Science and Engineering / Materials Engineering or a related discipline with a minimum of 70% marks or 7.0 CGPA from a recognized Institute/University and having qualified valid GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination conducted by Central Government Departments/Agencies.

salary_details.details: Junior Research Fellow: Rs.37,000/- per month + HRA (as per institute rule)

selection_process: Shortlisting based on merit and project needs Interview (Offline or Online)
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Overview
IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the IIT Jammu Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: M.Tech./M.E. in Chemical Engineering / Polymer Science and Engineering / Materials Engineering / Computational Chemistry or a related discipline with a minimum of 60% marks or 6.0 CGPA from a recognized Institute/University and having qualified GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination conducted by Central Government Departments/Agencies. B.Tech. /B.E. in Chemical Engineering / Polymer Science and Engineering / Materials Engineering or a related discipline with a minimum of 70% marks or 7.0 CGPA from a recognized Institute/University and having qualified valid GATE or an equivalent National-Level Examination conducted by Central Government Departments/Agencies.

content_sections.heading: Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: Maximum age limit is 28 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST/OBC/Physically Challenged/Women candidates will receive a 5-year age relaxation.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Junior Research Fellow: Rs.37,000/- per month + HRA (as per institute rule)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Shortlisting based on merit and project needs Interview (Offline or Online)

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 14-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of IIT Jammu to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Jammu is 14 July 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Junior Research Fellow at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: There is a total of 1 vacancy announced for the Junior Research Fellow position in the Indian Institute of Technology Jammu recruitment drive. This is for a project-based role as per the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Junior Research Fellow posts at IIT Jammu is entirely online. Interested and eligible candidates must submit their applications through the official online portal provided by IIT Jammu.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for a Junior Research Fellow at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: The selected Junior Research Fellow will receive a salary of Rs. 37,000/- per month, along with HRA (House Rent Allowance) as per the institute's rules. This compensation is for the project-based position.

faq.question: Q5. What are the age limits for the Junior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: Candidates applying for the Junior Research Fellow position should not be more than 28 years of age. Age relaxation of 5 years is applicable for candidates belonging to SC, ST, OBC, PwD, and Women categories.

faq.question: Q6. What is the required qualification for Junior Research Fellow?
faq.answer: Candidates must have an M.Tech./M.E. or B.Tech./B.E. in relevant engineering disciplines with a minimum percentage/CGPA and a valid GATE score or equivalent national-level examination qualification. Specific details are in the eligibility section.

faq.question: Q7. Where can I find the official notification for IIT Jammu JRF recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow recruitment can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It contains comprehensive details regarding the vacancy, eligibility, and application process.

faq.question: Q8. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: According to the extracted data, there is no application fee mentioned in the official notification for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow recruitment. Candidates should still refer to the official PDF for any updates.

faq.question: Q9. What is the selection process for Junior Research Fellow at IIT Jammu?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Junior Research Fellow position involves shortlisting candidates based on merit and project requirements, followed by an interview. The interview may be conducted either offline or online.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website to apply for IIT Jammu recruitment?
faq.answer: The official website to apply for the IIT Jammu Junior Research Fellow recruitment is https://apply.iitjammu.ac.in/#/home. Candidates can find the direct application link and other relevant information on this portal.

faq.answer: The last date for submitting the online application for the Junior Research Fellow position at IIT Jammu is 14 July 2026. Candidates are advised to complete their applications well before the deadline to avoid any last-minute issues.
